name: File Publish
description: Upload locally generated files to Azure Blob Storage and deliver them to the active chat channel (Telegram inline + URL; LINE/WhatsApp via URL).

mediaStorageAccount.description: Azure Blob Storage account name for public file hosting

mediaStorageKey.description: Azure Blob Storage shared key (or __KEYVAULT__ placeholder)

documentsContainer.description: Blob container name for uploaded files

workspaceRoot.description: Absolute path the agent is allowed to publish files from. Files outside this root are rejected.

maxSizeMB.description: Maximum file size to publish (Telegram sendDocument cap is 50 MB)

telegramMaxSizeMB.description: Maximum file size to send inline via Telegram Bot API
